html:
Exclusive to:

A Sea Stack is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are stationary obstacles located in the Ocean.

When hit by a Boat, they cause damage to its health. They might also be destroyed themselves if enough damage is done. When destroyed or mined, they drop four Rocks. Some of them may sink in the ocean and cannot be retrieved.

May be converted with a Sea Sprout Starter.

Sea Stacks may be found painted yellow to indicate their proximity to Moon Quay.

Trivia

  • Sea Stacks were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • They are renewable because the Crab King spawns a circle of them around him when you flee the fight.

Gallery

  • old texture
  • All Variants of 1st Sea Stack
  • All Variants of 2nd Sea Stack
  • All Variants of 3rd Sea Stack
  • All Variants of 4th Sea Stack
  • All Variants of 5th Sea Stack

“It's a rock.”
–Wilson
“It's just a big boring sea rock.”
–Willow
“Is a big watery rock.”
–Wolfgang
“I could steer toward it and resign myself to a watery fate.”
–Wendy
“A HEINOUS OCEAN ROCK”
–WX-78
“It would be no good to run aground of that.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a sea stack.”
–Woodie
“It would be easy to wreck a vessel on one of those.”
–Maxwell
“I shall nöt dash mine ship upön thee!”
–Wigfrid
“We hope no one crashes their boat on that!”
–Webber
“A big lumpy rock.”
–Warly
“Oops! Watch out!”
–Wormwood
“It's a big rock in the middle of nowhere.”
–Winona
“It would be quite a shock to hit that rock.”
–Wortox
“Ooooh, big rock!”
–Wurt
“Rocks off the port bow!”
–Walter
“Don't you dare hit my boat!”
–Wanda
A Sea Stack is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are stationary obstacles located in the Ocean.
When hit by a Boat, they cause damage to its health. They might also be destroyed themselves if enough damage is done. When destroyed or mined, they drop four Rocks. Some of them may sink in the ocean and cannot be retrieved.
May be converted with a Sea Sprout Starter.
Sea Stacks may be found painted yellow to indicate their proximity to Moon Quay.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Sea Stacks were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
They are renewable because the Crab King spawns a circle of them around him when you flee the fight.

A '''Sea Stack''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They are stationary obstacles located in the [[Ocean]].

When hit by a [[Boat Kit|Boat]], they cause damage to its health. They might also be destroyed themselves if enough damage is done. When destroyed or mined, they drop four [[Rocks]]. Some of them may sink in the ocean and cannot be retrieved.

May be converted with a [[Sea Sprout Starter]].

Sea Stacks may be found painted yellow to indicate their proximity to [[Moon Quay]].
{{Clear}}
== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Sea Stacks were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Turn of Tides|Turn of Tides]]'' update.
* They are renewable because the [[Crab King]] spawns a circle of them around him when you flee the fight.
